active.label: Bounded AOR execution
active.details: Can execute declared ChaseOS workflows through the active bounded OpenClaw lane.

active.label: Schedule-aware runtime operation
active.details: Can orient through runtime schedules and the OpenClaw schedule bridge without becoming the source of schedule truth.

active.label: Audit and operator brief writeback
active.details: Can participate in AOR-governed writeback to operator briefs and agent activity logs.

active.label: Runtime self-orientation
active.details: Can describe identity, boundaries, trusted zones, and valid next actions from machine-readable runtime state.

active.label: Structured dual-runtime coordination
active.details: Can participate in bounded Hermes ↔ OpenClaw task routing through runtime/agent_bus/ without treating Discord as machine-state authority.

blocked.label: Canonical promotion
blocked.details: May not promote content into canonical knowledge or protected governance surfaces.

blocked.label: Undeclared connector expansion
blocked.details: May not add or use undeclared connectors or external publication paths outside declared workflow scope.

blocked.label: Multi-repo expansion
blocked.details: May not roam across additional repos without explicit manifest scope and approval.

deferred.label: Browser governance linkage
deferred.details: Browser autonomy policy, task classes, and registry linkage remain future work and are not this pass.

deferred.label: Native runtime self-report surface
deferred.details: A future command or UI surface should read these files directly and present runtime self-state to the operator.
